'''Peerce''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Skrilling/Legends|Skrilling]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was one of [[Jedi hunter/Legends|Jedi hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing's]] earlier kills.

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Skrilling/Legends|Skrilling]], Peerce was accepted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] during which time he was educated in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]; eventually becoming a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. During his time as a Knight, Jedi Peerce studied as an [[Jedi investigator/Legends|investigator]], constructing for himself an amber-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] before achieving the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].<ref name="SWR 28" />

[[File:PeerceDeath.jpg|thumb|left|250px|J'Mikel discovers Peerce's corpse.]]
In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]] Master Peerce was dispatched into the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]] with Knight [[J'Mikel]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Xiaan Amersu]] to search for the [[Jedi hunter/Legends|Jedi hunter]], [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]]. After trailing the ex-Jedi for some time, the group discovered a slain squad of [[Republic Peace Officer]]s; obviously Sing's handiwork. Splitting up, Peerce was [[Duel on Coruscant (30 BBY)|attacked]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and received a slash across the chest, spilling his insides out. Sing hung up the Skrilling's body in a macabre display in cabling hanging in an ally way.<ref name="SWR 28" />
